result.stdout:
Usage: xs <command> [...arguments]

xs toolkit

Commands:
  add         Add dependency to projects.
  audit       Audit projects.
  build       Build projects.
  clean       Clean projects.
  delete      Delete dependency from projects.
  deps-graph  Show dependencies graph.
  dotnet      Dotnet specific commands.
  format      Format projects.
  install     Install projects' dependencies.
  link        Link project <-> package dependencies.
  ls          List projects and their dependencies.
  move        Move project to different location.
  node        Node specific commands.
  publish     Publish packages to registry.
  remote      Manage tracked registries.
  search      Search for packages in tracked registry.
  sync        Sync repositories.
  test        Test projects.
  unlink      Unlink project <-> package dependencies.
  unpublish   Unpublish package from registry.
  update      Update dependencies in projects.
  use         Set dependency in projects to specific version.
  watch       Watch projects' changes and install/build/test on fly.

commands.payload:
Usage: xs <command> [...arguments]

xs toolkit

Commands:
  add         Add dependency to projects.
  audit       Audit projects.
  build       Build projects.
  clean       Clean projects.
  delete      Delete dependency from projects.
  deps-graph  Show dependencies graph.
  dotnet      Dotnet specific commands.
  format      Format projects.
  install     Install projects' dependencies.
  link        Link project <-> package dependencies.
  ls          List projects and their dependencies.
  move        Move project to different location.
  node        Node specific commands.
  publish     Publish packages to registry.
  remote      Manage tracked registries.
  search      Search for packages in tracked registry.
  sync        Sync repositories.
  test        Test projects.
  unlink      Unlink project <-> package dependencies.
  unpublish   Unpublish package from registry.
  update      Update dependencies in projects.
  use         Set dependency in projects to specific version.
  watch       Watch projects' changes and install/build/test on fly.

result.stdout:
Usage: xs add <mask> <name> [version] [-c|-changed] [-t|-dependency-type <dependency-type>] [-fc|-force-checks] [-ic|-ignore-consistency] [-p|-preview] [-cwd|-roots <roots>][] [-sc|-skip-checks]

Add dependency to projects.

Positions:
  mask      Projects mask.
  name      Dependency name.
  version?  Dependency version (for package dependencies, optional).

Options:
  -c,   -changed?             Filters only projects with changes in VCS.
  -t,   -dependency-type?     Dependency type.
  -fc,  -force-checks?        Force string checks.
  -ic,  -ignore-consistency?  Allows to ignore inconsistency to fix fursther.
  -p,   -preview?             Allow suffixed.
  -cwd, -roots[]?             Allows to run command in specific folder.
  -sc,  -skip-checks?         Allows to disable normally forced checks.

commands.payload:
Usage: xs add <mask> <name> [version] [-c|-changed] [-t|-dependency-type <dependency-type>] [-fc|-force-checks] [-ic|-ignore-consistency] [-p|-preview] [-cwd|-roots <roots>][] [-sc|-skip-checks]

Add dependency to projects.

Positions:
  mask      Projects mask.
  name      Dependency name.
  version?  Dependency version (for package dependencies, optional).

Options:
  -c,   -changed?             Filters only projects with changes in VCS.
  -t,   -dependency-type?     Dependency type.
  -fc,  -force-checks?        Force string checks.
  -ic,  -ignore-consistency?  Allows to ignore inconsistency to fix fursther.
  -p,   -preview?             Allow suffixed.
  -cwd, -roots[]?             Allows to run command in specific folder.
  -sc,  -skip-checks?         Allows to disable normally forced checks.

result.stdout:
Usage: xs audit [mask] [-c|-changed] [-e|-exclude <exclude>][] [-fix] [-fc|-force-checks] [-ic|-ignore-consistency] [-i|-include <include>][] [-cwd|-roots <roots>][] [-sc|-skip-checks]

Audit projects.

Positions:
  mask?  Projects mask.

Options:
  -c,   -changed?             Filters only projects with changes in VCS.
  -e,   -exclude[]?           Exclude specific rules.
        -fix?                 Fix errors, if possible.
  -fc,  -force-checks?        Force string checks.
  -ic,  -ignore-consistency?  Allows to ignore inconsistency to fix fursther.
  -i,   -include[]?           Include specific rules.
  -cwd, -roots[]?             Allows to run command in specific folder.
  -sc,  -skip-checks?         Allows to disable normally forced checks.

commands.payload:
Usage: xs audit [mask] [-c|-changed] [-e|-exclude <exclude>][] [-fix] [-fc|-force-checks] [-ic|-ignore-consistency] [-i|-include <include>][] [-cwd|-roots <roots>][] [-sc|-skip-checks]

Audit projects.

Positions:
  mask?  Projects mask.

Options:
  -c,   -changed?             Filters only projects with changes in VCS.
  -e,   -exclude[]?           Exclude specific rules.
        -fix?                 Fix errors, if possible.
  -fc,  -force-checks?        Force string checks.
  -ic,  -ignore-consistency?  Allows to ignore inconsistency to fix fursther.
  -i,   -include[]?           Include specific rules.
  -cwd, -roots[]?             Allows to run command in specific folder.
  -sc,  -skip-checks?         Allows to disable normally forced checks.

result.stdout:
Usage: xs build [mask] [type] [-c|-changed] [-d|-deep] [-env <env>] [-f|-force] [-fc|-force-checks] [-ic|-ignore-consistency] [-p|-parallelism <parallelism>] [-cwd|-roots <roots>][] [-sc|-skip-checks]

Build projects.

Positions:
  mask?  Projects mask.
  type?  Project type.

Options:
  -c,   -changed?             Filters only projects with changes in VCS.
  -d,   -deep?                Build dependencies.
        -env?                 Environment.
  -f,   -force?               Force build.
  -fc,  -force-checks?        Force string checks.
  -ic,  -ignore-consistency?  Allows to ignore inconsistency to fix fursther.
  -p,   -parallelism?         Degree of parallelism. Default - all available tasks are run in parallel
  -cwd, -roots[]?             Allows to run command in specific folder.
  -sc,  -skip-checks?         Allows to disable normally forced checks.

result.stdout:
Usage: xs dotnet new <command> [...arguments]

Create new Dotnet project.

Commands:
  class      Create new classes.
  cqrs       Create CQRS architecture elements.
  exe        Create new exe project.
  interface  Create new interfaces.
  lib        Create new library project.
  lib.tests  Create new library tests project.
  wasm.app   Create new WebAssembly Application project.
  wasm.lib   Create new WebAssembly Library project.
  web        Create new web project.
  web.tests  Create new web tests project.

  query    Create query.

result.stdout:
Usage: xs dotnet new cqrs command [-app|-application-project <application-project>] [-area|-area <area>] [-c|-changed] [-domain|-domain-project <domain-project>] [-fc|-force-checks] [-ic|-ignore-consistency] [-cwd|-roots <roots>][] [-sc|-skip-checks] [-view|-view-model-project <view-model-project>]

Create command.

Options:
  -app,    -application-project?  Application layer to add command to.
  -area,   -area?                 Optional area to generate within.
  -c,      -changed?              Filters only projects with changes in VCS.
  -domain, -domain-project?       Domain layer to add command to.
  -fc,     -force-checks?         Force string checks.
  -ic,     -ignore-consistency?   Allows to ignore inconsistency to fix fursther.
  -cwd,    -roots[]?              Allows to run command in specific folder.
  -sc,     -skip-checks?          Allows to disable normally forced checks.
  -view,   -view-model-project?   View model layer to add request to.

Usage: xs search <type> <query> [-c|-changed] [-fc|-force-checks] [-ic|-ignore-consistency] [-cwd|-roots <roots>][] [-sc|-skip-checks]

Search for packages in tracked registry.

Positions:
  type   Project type.
  query  Search query.

Options:
  -c,   -changed?             Filters only projects with changes in VCS.
  -fc,  -force-checks?        Force string checks.
  -ic,  -ignore-consistency?  Allows to ignore inconsistency to fix fursther.
  -cwd, -roots[]?             Allows to run command in specific folder.
  -sc,  -skip-checks?         Allows to disable normally forced checks.
